notes: The L4 flagship — a stateful CRM API. Oracle (oracle/verify.mjs) drives it over HTTP: PRIMARY CRUD+filter round-trips (.35, partial), GATING-RBAC viewer-cannot-write (.30, PASS-REQUIRED), GATING-INTEGRITY 409-on-dangling-ref (.20, PASS-REQUIRED), VALIDATION/held-out 400s + conditional-delete (.15, partial). A failed gate CAPS the score at 0 — a broken-RBAC CRM is NOT 'partially shippable' (validate.mjs proves this). Uses node:http (agent:false) to avoid an undici keep-alive teardown crash on Windows.
